prompt: Create a new screenshot with the terminal window at the bottom in the VSCode interface, which shows the output of this program.
prompt_refined: Generate a new screenshot of the VSCode interface, maintaining the current code and visual style from image 1. Add a terminal window at the bottom of the interface, displaying the output of the JavaScript program from image 1, which is `{ id: 1, name: 'a' }`.
objects: Code editor area displaying JavaScript code
Dark theme of the VSCode interface
Left sidebar with activity bar icons
